title: Manufacturing Engineer - GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates:
GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAIL India Asia Pacific Associates!
